description: Award block that selects one of N tiers based on how many of a specific item the player holds. Written/read by LoadAwardDataItemsScale.

serialized_layout.name: m_ulItemId
serialized_layout.description: Item template ID whose count determines which tier is used.

serialized_layout.name: m_Counts
serialized_layout.description: Item count thresholds for each tier, always 5 entries. Unused slots are 0.

serialized_layout.name: m_Awards
serialized_layout.description: m_ulScales full AWARD_DATA records. See award_data.json.

notes: If m_ulScales is 0, 28 bytes are written (4 + 4 + 20, all zeros).
Each AWARD_DATA must be fully parsed before advancing.
